commands: python -m pip install --quiet --upgrade pip || python -m pip install --upgrade pip

for attempt in 1 2 3; do echo 'Installing nbconvert: Attempt $attempt of 3...' && python -m pip install --quiet --upgrade nbconvert && break; if [ $attempt -lt 3 ]; then sleep $((2 ** attempt)); fi; done
if [ ! -f advanced_day10.py ]; then echo 'ERROR: Conversion failed'; exit 1; fi
